div.div: Record your check-in and begin your beat

div.t-on-click: () => line.visitStatus?.status !== 'completed' and state.attendance.checkedIn and openStartVisit(line, line_index)

div.div: No beats assigned for today. Contact your manager.
Your location will be recorded for check-in
GPS location will be recorded automatically

textarea.placeholder: Explain why you need to switch beats...
